entries.title: Terms of Service Change Notifier
entries.notes: Buildable by capturing page snapshots and diffing on revisit using the Storage API and a simple hash comparison. The gap is consumer-grade change alerts versus enterprise legal tools. Works for any site with a ToS page.
entries.pain: Most users never re-read terms they agreed to, missing privacy regressions buried in updates by services they depend on.

entries.title: Stock Price Context Overlay
entries.notes: Integrates with free Yahoo Finance endpoints to show ticker context on LinkedIn/company pages. Overlay injection is straightforward. Existing tools lack the in-page context at point-of-view moment.
entries.pain: Sales reps lose deals when they miss stock price movements that signal a prospect's financial health or urgency.

entries.title: Learning Platform Progress Hub
entries.notes: Uses OAuth integrations with course platforms where available, fallback to page scraping. Syncs progress to a unified sidebar. Platform fragmentation is the core pain this solves.
entries.pain: Professionals juggling multiple courses on Coursera, Udemy, and LinkedIn Learning lose track of where they left off in each.

entries.title: Medical Appointment Reminder Engine
entries.notes: Scrapes appointment dates from patient portal emails via Gmail API, sets Chrome notifications with lead-time customization. Health portal fragmentation is acute and growing.
entries.pain: Patients miss follow-up appointments because reminders live in separate portals from their daily workflow.

entries.title: Real Estate Price History Tracker
entries.notes: Builds on Zillow/Redfin listing page scraping with price history extraction and badge notifications on changes. Real estate sites have stable DOM structures for reliable scraping.
entries.pain: Home buyers lose leverage when they miss price drops on listings they saved weeks ago.

entries.title: Academic Citation Claim Verifier
entries.notes: When a PDF or paper page is viewed, parses citations and cross-references against Semantic Scholar API for claim verification. No API access for many publishers so PDF parsing is the path.
entries.pain: Researchers waste hours chasing citations that don't support the claims made in the papers they read.

entries.title: News Source Credibility Score
entries.notes: Looks up current domain against curated bias/fact-check databases like MBFC and NewsGuard, displays sidebar badge. Lightweight and actionable, no ML required.
entries.pain: Readers share news articles without understanding the source's fact-check record or known biases.

entries.title: Recurring Subscription Price Hike Detector
entries.notes: Parses Stripe-powered billing emails from Gmail API, tracks amounts over time, alerts on increases. Stripe powers a large percentage of SaaS billing so coverage is broad.
entries.pain: Consumers miss price increases on subscriptions because billing emails get buried and changes happen silently.

entries.title: Ad Landing Page Performance Spy
entries.notes: Detects when a LinkedIn/email click lands on a page, injects performance metrics overlay (load time, Core Web Vitals) and screenshot preview. Useful for sales teams running ad campaigns.
entries.pain: Marketers launching cold outreach can't verify if the landing pages prospects visit are live, fast, or matching the ad copy.

entries.title: Interview Question Context Injector
entries.notes: On LinkedIn profile pages, injects a sidebar with past interview questions the candidate may have answered publicly (HN, podcasts, GitHub). Scrapes public data only, no PII scraping.
entries.pain: Recruiters and hiring managers go into interviews without context on candidates' publicly available professional history.

entries.title: Travel Package Price History Chart
entries.notes: Scrapes Google Flights and booking sites, stores price history in localStorage, displays mini chart overlay on future visits. Chrome storage quota handles years of data.
entries.pain: Travelers buy flights and hotels at peak prices because they can't see historical trends inline on booking pages.

entries.title: GCP Resource Tag Completeness Checker
entries.notes: Integrates with GCP Resource Manager API to list resources and their tags, displays badge on non-compliant resources in the GCP Console. Tag policy enforcement gap is common at scale.
entries.pain: GCP admins get surprise billing because resources were launched without required cost-center tags.

entries.title: PDF Annotation Sync Across Readers
entries.notes: Uses PDF.js to extract highlights, syncs to a cloud backend via extension storage, re-injects highlights when reopening. Cross-device PDF continuity is a real pain for researchers.
entries.pain: Highlights and notes made in Chrome PDF viewer disappear when switching to a different browser or device.

entries.title: Crypto Portfolio P&L Overlay
entries.notes: Scrapes portfolio data from exchanges when authenticated, combines with live prices to show per-holding P&L on any page. Privacy-respecting local calculation only.
entries.pain: Crypto holders check prices on CoinGecko but miss how their specific holdings performed relative to the headline price.
